title: cynodon tenellus
intro: Cynodon tenellus, also known as Bermuda grass, is a type of warm-season grass that is native to Africa and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynodon tenellus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Cynodon tenellus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying the plant and using it as a powder or capsule supplement.
